languages.text: "Декабалус не тот, за кого себя выдает! Во имя Бога -Императора, Паск, убей еретика!"

traits.locale_text: "Декабалус не тот, за кого себя выдает! Во имя Бога -Императора, Паск, убей еретика!"

languages.text: "Decabalus is not what he claims to be! In the name of the God-Emperor, Pask, kill the heretic!"
languages.original_text: "Декабалус не тот, за кого себя выдает! Во имя Бога -Императора, Паск, убей еретика!"

traits.locale_text: "Decabalus is not what he claims to be! In the name of the God-Emperor, Pask, kill the heretic!"
"Decabalus is not what he claims to be! In the name of the God-Emperor, Pask, kill the heretic!"
"Decabalus is not what he claims to be! In the name of the God-Emperor, Pask, kill the heretic!"

languages.text: 「デカバラスは自称とは違う！神皇帝の名において、パスク、異端者を殺せ！」
languages.original_text: "Decabalus is not what he claims to be! In the name of the God-Emperor, Pask, kill the heretic!"

traits.locale_text: 「デカバラスは自称とは違う！神皇帝の名において、パスク、異端者を殺せ！」

languages.text: «¡Decabalus no es lo que afirma ser! Por el Dios Emperador, Pask, ¡mate a ese hereje!».
languages.original_text: "Decabalus is not what he claims to be! In the name of the God-Emperor, Pask, kill the heretic!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Decabalus no es lo que afirma ser! Por el Dios Emperador, Pask, ¡mate a ese hereje!».

languages.text: “德卡巴洛斯可不像他说的那么清白！以神皇之名，帕斯克，杀了那个异端！”
languages.original_text: "Decabalus is not what he claims to be! In the name of the God-Emperor, Pask, kill the heretic!"

traits.locale_text: “德卡巴洛斯可不像他说的那么清白！以神皇之名，帕斯克，杀了那个异端！”

languages.text: "Decabalus ist nicht, was er zu sein vorgibt! Im Namen des Gottimperators, Pask, tötet die Ketzerin!"
languages.original_text: "Decabalus is not what he claims to be! In the name of the God-Emperor, Pask, kill the heretic!"

traits.locale_text: "Decabalus ist nicht, was er zu sein vorgibt! Im Namen des Gottimperators, Pask, tötet die Ketzerin!"

languages.text: "Decabalus, iddia ettiği kişi değil! Tanrı İmparator adına Pask, kâfiri öldür!"
languages.original_text: "Decabalus is not what he claims to be! In the name of the God-Emperor, Pask, kill the heretic!"

traits.locale_text: "Decabalus, iddia ettiği kişi değil! Tanrı İmparator adına Pask, kâfiri öldür!"

languages.text: « Décabalus n'est pas ce qu'il prétend ! Au nom de l'Empereur-Dieu, Pask, tuez l'hérétique ! »
languages.original_text: "Decabalus is not what he claims to be! In the name of the God-Emperor, Pask, kill the heretic!"
